title: poa howellii
intro: Poa howellii, also known as Howell's bluegrass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae, native to western North America. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Poa howellii include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Poa howellii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
